title: Use of English - Test 3
explanation:
Use of English - B2 Test 3

Final mixed review.

questions.text: She got her passport [*renewed|renew|renewing] in one day.
The politician was reported [*to have resigned|resigning|resign] last week.
It is vital that the data [*remain|remains|remained] confidential.
I haven't read the report, and neither [*has|have|do] my assistant.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The artist's latest work is considered a ____.  | *masterpiece | master | mastering
Governments must reduce carbon ____.  | *emissions | emit | emitted
The lecture focused on urban ____.  | *planning | plan | planned
Good leaders know how to ____ teams under pressure. | *motivate | motivation | motivated
Only by working together [*can|we can|could] we solve the problem.
He [*must have misunderstood|can't have misunderstood|should misunderstand] the instructions.
I'd prefer the blue jacket rather than the black [*one|ones|it].
The doctor recommended that she [*rest|rests|rested] for several days.
